title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: Kattumannarkoil, an agrarian constituency where basic demands of farmers remain unfulfilled
description: Given the caste matrix of the constituency, where there are 2.24 lakh voters with a strong mix of Dalits and Vanniyars, it is the consolidation of these major groups that holds the key. The constituency also has a good concentration of Muslims and has traditionally favoured candidates of the DMK, the Congress and the VCK
